name: India Tourism Development Corporation Limited
summary: India Tourism Development Corporation Limited, together with its subsidiaries, acquires, constructs, and operates hotels, beach resorts, and lodges/restaurants for tourists in India. The company also provides transport, entertainment, and shopping facilities; produces, distributes, and sells tourist publicity literature; and offers tourism and hospitality related training and education services, full-fledged money changer services, engineering related consultancy services, etc. In addition, it provides engineering technical services; management consultancy and advisory services; and consultancy services for adventure tourism sector, as well as prepares techno-economic feasibility reports. Further, the company manages events, conferences, and exhibitions; offers advertising and catering services; operates sound and light shows. As of March 31, 2020, it operated 4 Ashok Group of Hotels, 4 joint venture hotels, a restaurant, 14 duty free shops, 1 sound and light shows, 1 managed unit, and 4 catering establishments. India Tourism Development Corporation Limited was incorporated in 1965 and is based in New Delhi, India.
